name: design-system-review
safety_limits: treat unsupported checks as skipped instead of false pass
keep the review evidence-based and advisory
forbidden_actions: declare a formal design system where none exists
replace repository evidence with taste alone
human_approval_triggers: the task asks for an external design tool integration
the user asks to rewrite the visual identity automatically
rollback_manual: no rollback needed because the skill returns a read-only review
validations: typography and spacing findings cite real files
the review distinguishes pass, warning and skipped
